topIssues: Frame 5 & 6: These frames are completely identical, representing a duplicate frame artifact in the GIF export that unnecessarily splits the final static state.
Frame 5: The crucial resolution frame where the smart-merge completes is shown for only 900ms before repeating in Frame 6, causing a jarring pacing hiccup.
Frame 4: The Room Trace log at the bottom shifts abruptly, hiding the 'Your NodeAgent session started' event prematurely and creating a jump-cut effect.
Frame 1-6: Extremely low color contrast on secondary text elements like the row IDs (e.g., 'r_rev') and the helper text ('click a Variance...'), making them nearly illegible.
fixSuggestions: Merge Frame 5 and Frame 6 into a single final frame with a continuous display time of ~5000ms to eliminate the duplicate frame artifact.
Increase the contrast of the dark gray text elements (row IDs, helper text, and inactive trace events) to meet WCAG accessibility standards on dark backgrounds.
Animate or smooth out the Room Trace scroll behavior so events do not abruptly jump out of view when a new event is appended.
